mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that reduces consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE > 4.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 103.5 signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate profitability and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO > 103.5 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts below 1.3 million signals a weakening supply environment that reduces new capacity and boosts corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST < 1.3M are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payroll employment above 160,000 signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS > 160K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income above 2.3 trillion signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts consumer spending and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with RSAFS > 2.3T are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the CPI above 320.5 signals a strengthening inflation environment that boosts interest rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with CPIAUCSL > 320.5 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 103.2 signals a weakening supply environment that reduces corporate profitability and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 103.2 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
